trans-unit.source: Get a status report about your site's operation and any detected problems.
trans-unit.target: Hol dir nen Status-Report ueber deine Site und erkannte Probleme.

trans-unit.source: Review key site parameters and installation issues. You can copy this information into TYPO3 support requests or project issue trackers.
trans-unit.target: Check die wichtigsten Site-Parameter und Installations-Issues. Kannst die Infos in TYPO3 Support-Anfragen oder Issue-Tracker kopieren.
